The '''''Vengeance''''' was a [[YV-260 light freighter]] owned by the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bomu Clan]]. It was commanded by [[Heedron Bomu]] and his brother [[Ormann Bomu|Ormann]] who both worked for [[Zonnos Anjiliac Priare|Zonnos]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. It was armed with twin pairs of [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], a pair of [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]] and a turret-mounted [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]].

The ship was sent to prevent the rescue of Zonnos' brother [[Mika Anjiliac Chiera|Mika]], however it failed in that mission. Ormann was killed and the rest of the crew handed over to the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tempest Feud]]''
